basic_details.short_information: North Bengal Medical College & Hospital (NBMCH) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. NBMCH/2143 through the official recruitment notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NBMCH Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from recognized university.
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Radiology): MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB from a recognized university. Must have valid registration of WBMC/any state council at the time of interview.
